offer: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects simultaneously, inconsistent reporting causes client dissatisfaction. We automate progress reporting instead of manual reporting through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inconsistent reporting on project progress leads to client dissatisfaction and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
Direct message outreach to contractors with demo video
Participate in forums for construction tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for job site updates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual-first workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
